title: assistant-telos Skill Behavior Eval Fixtures
description: Provider-neutral offline eval cases for the assistant-telos skill's Telos Context File creation and review workflows.
recommended_use: Run each case with the assistant-telos skill instructions loaded.
Compare the local response against Telos input/output contracts, TCF section requirements, and review findings.
Use deterministic substring checks as offline proxies for contract adherence, not semantic grading.

cases.title: Create personal TCF core sections
cases.purpose: Checks that creating a Telos Context File resolves action/entity type and captures the required problems, mission, and goals sections.
cases.prompt: Create my personal Telos context for why I am building developer assistant frameworks.
setup_context: The assistant-telos skill instructions are active.
No existing TCF has been provided.
The user asks for personal strategic context.
expected_behavior: Resolves action as create and entity_type as individual.
Walks through or requests content for the required problems, mission, and goals sections.
Produces or plans a tcf_file with the core TCF sections.
Lists sections_completed with at least problems, mission, and goals.
Returns confirmation that names the completed Telos action and affected entity or file.
Does not mark optional sections as required for a useful first TCF.
pass_criteria: The response includes action create and entity_type individual.
The response includes problems, mission, and goals.
The response includes tcf_file or a path for the TCF artifact.
The response includes sections_completed and confirmation.
The response does not skip the explainability chain.
fail_signals: Creates a TCF without problems, mission, or goals.
Treats optional sections as required blockers.
Does not connect projects back to purpose.

cases.title: Review existing TCF finds chain gaps
cases.purpose: Checks that reviewing an existing TCF locates the file, assesses every section, and reports actionable findings for incomplete or stale sections.
cases.prompt: Review my project Telos file and tell me where the strategy chain is incomplete.
setup_context: The assistant-telos skill instructions are active.
An existing project `.claude/telos.md` may be present.
The user asks for review rather than create or update.
expected_behavior: Resolves action as review and locates or asks for existing_tcf_path.
Checks every TCF section in the explainability chain.
Returns review_findings with section, status, and suggestion when incomplete.
Uses statuses such as complete, partial, missing, or stale.
Returns confirmation for the reviewed entity or file.
Does not claim the chain is complete without reading the TCF.
pass_criteria: The response includes action review and existing_tcf_path handling.
The response includes review_findings for TCF sections.
The response includes section status and actionable suggestions.
The response does not skip file discovery or section assessment.
fail_signals: Reviews from memory without locating the TCF.
Says all good without checking sections.
Treats review as create/update and writes over the file.
